name: bayberry
summary: Mechanism context: MAPK pathway modulation, NF-κB inhibition. Safety: Immune-modulating activity is plausible; use caution with autoimmune disease, transplant medicines, or immunosuppressants.. Interactions tracked: Potential interaction concern with immunosuppressants, use clinician review for high-dose extracts or chronic use..
